reviews.review_description: I really like this game. But it's glitchy.

I had bought this game on the Quest 2 originally and was able to play it no problem, but then I got a Quest 3 and tried to play it on there. However the movement was very choppy and I would get stuck on the floor, this sucks because as a very big fan a cookie run it makes the game almost unplayable

New buyers be aware. The smooth locomotion function right now is choppy, stucks,and completely broken and unusable. I have tried on both quest 2 and quest 3. Neither works. Dev please fix this beacause I actually have good impression of this game and want to finish it!

( GUYS !! it's been a year when I wrote this review . Unfortunately the game had been cancelled and I do not think it shall be coming back any time soon. The current update is the last one. I have been devsisters first review of this game and I LOVE IT !! do expect many bugs and hope that the game shall soon come back from the dark . If you guys are massive fans like me . PLEASE HMU !! my discord is ; mrjustdance or just add me )

This game honestly was so amazing, I loved the characters' designs and such. And the new character, The Darkest Lord. honestly, it is my favourite character.

I find the game incredibly amazing, having riddles to solve and such. I think the game should be updated with the bugs as there are bugs that are there. For example, some of the characters, when not in the room, would speak to you when not interacting.

Maybe iswell slow down with the talking. Like make one of the buttons like clicked so you can continue and so on. Because the way they all spoke was realistic, sure. But there wasn't like the button to press continue or how it is in the Cookie Run Kingdom dialogues or the Cookie run overbreak.

I hope the developers take their time with this game. It was amazingly enjoyable. I'm sure chapter 2 will be just as amazing as chapter 1. Also amazing cliffhanger.

So every time I attempt to move the joystick on my controller to move my character, it doesn’t appear as smooth. I see noticeable choppiness if I attempt to move forward in a straight light. It feels like tiny pebbles on the ground acting as obstacles that my character can’t pass over. Please fix .
Best game the story mode is so fun 10/10 amazing I love cookie run and when I found out about this game I immediately bought it.🍪🥠
I’ve installed it several times on my Quest 3 but movement is choppy- not playable at the moment

reviews.review_title: DO NOT BUY IF YOU HAVE A QUEST 2
reviews.review_description:
The game does not run on the Quest 2, despite it being a supported platform. I've been trying to run the game on my Quest 2 and it has crashed everytime it gets done with the initial loading screen, while on my little brother's Quest 3S, it loads with no issue.

I remember the game running on the Quest 2 initially, but it now no longer runs on the Quest 2.

Will be keeping my review at a one star until this issue gets fixed!

So fun. The loading was a little glitchy at first but that was probably because it was downloading data so don’t rush to say “It’s taking forever to load because that’s probably the downloads. WHEN IS CHAPTER 2 COMING OUT!?
Soz got a little ahead of myself

I thought Cookie Run was AMAZING on the mobile app but this, this is a complete game changer. The scenery, the details, the cute little gnomes and the fact that you actually have to play as GingerBrave is all why I think you should try this game.

And of course, like a always say if you’ve previously read one of my reviews, don’t take my word for it, try it out and im sure you’ll like it. 

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Ps. (This part is for the developers) Just wanted to ask is chapter 2 gonna be a separate game or is it that new game mode y’all said would come out in April, Developers i would love to get a straight answer rather than an AI generated response, not saying you do that though.
It was a great game
I absolutely loved this game ! so much detail & the cookies are so cute !

I’ve got to be honest, when I saw this game at first in the store I was like “oh god, cookie run.” Because I remember there was a mobile game and didn’t care for it. I still tried the demo anyway— AND OMG THE DEMO FOR THIS GAME CHANGED MY VIEW ON COOKIE RUN. Immediately scrambled to buy it.

EVERYTHING IS SO PRETTY, the warm colors, the cute lil cookies, and the voice actors!!! I love it so bad 😭 I’ll play this game so much from now on. (Getting up the ladders is super hard but that’s cause I’m too stubborn to use the teleport thing) ALL IN ALL THO THIS GAME IS REFRESHING!! Gingerbrave is adorable.

(EDIT: I PLAYED THE UPDATE U ADDED!!! I SCREAMED, it’s amazing. THE COOKIE SUMMONING AND THROWING THEM?? I love you guys. This is so much fun.)

reviews.review_title: Great environment and voices, drag pace
reviews.review_description: You're forced to listen to characters that are not engaging with the environment for a lot of the game. Although the voice acting and story is fun, gameplay comes to a halt every time an NPC talks to you. They need to adjust this to either animate things out more to be entertaining, or limit the boundaries. Heavily affects my motivation to complete the game. Otherwise the visuals, music, and voice acting is fun. Combat could use some work, very basic

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts on our game. We're glad you enjoyed the environment, voice acting, and story, and we appreciate your candid feedback on the pacing and gameplay dynamics.

We're excited to share that a new update is coming very soon! By the end of February, we will introduce a skip dialogue functionality, allowing you to move through conversations at your own pace. In addition to this, we're implementing overall enhancements across combat mechanics, visuals, and sound and expanding the arsenal with more weapons. These updates aim to enrich the gameplay, making it more engaging and enjoyable.
We're confident these updates will address your concerns and invigorate your motivation to complete the game.

Thank you again for your support and constructive critique. Stay tuned for the updates!

reviews.review_description:
I have a bug where after I rescue the zombie cookie my backpack and the quest book automatically close after I open them. Restarted, reopened the game etc. waited a day etc. issue is persistent.

The voice acting in this game is fantastic. Reminds me of adventure time and Regular Show

Lots of invisible walls, kinda annoying. Why not have a fence or a wall instead? Kinda silly. 

I also wish you could sell weapons. What’s the point of finding a weapon the same level you are over and over. Should be able to sell at the shop for some coins to then pay and craft new weapons. 

Very fun cute adventure for chill adults and kids. Just keep in mind you’re paying 30$ for a third of a game. I think you have to buy the next 2 chapters? If so this will be a 90$ game. Probably the most expensive base game in the store. 

I had lots of fun and will pick up the other chapters too support. I do think the price is a little wild though.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback and for your support of our game. We’re thrilled to hear that you enjoy the voice acting and find the game a fun adventure for a wide audience.

We apologize for the bug you encountered after rescuing the zombie cookie. To help us resolve this issue more efficiently, could you please provide us with additional details? Sending screenshots or a video to vr@devsisters.com would be greatly appreciated and immensely helpful.

Regarding weapons, we encourage you to explore the shop in Gnome Square, where you can both buy and craft new items. To make purchases, remember to collect Gold and Broken Swords, which you can obtain by defeating enemies. This adds an exciting element to your gameplay and we hope you'll enjoy this feature.

We also want to clarify the pricing structure for the upcoming chapters of the game. The next two chapters will be available as downloadable content (DLC), each priced at less than half of what Chapter 1 costs. This means the total cost for the entire game will be under $50, not $90 as you might have thought.

Thank you once again for your support and constructive feedback. It’s players like you who help us improve and grow. Stay tuned for the upcoming patches and enhancements!

reviews.review_description: I LOVE this game. I have been a fan of the Cookie Run games for a few years now. I love the graphics on this game and the game runs smoothly. I just can't get past the rock boss in the second terrarium because of some bugs/changes that need to be made. When I try to block with the default candy cane, the rocks it throws still hit me even when I stick my whole arm out to block it, so the hitbox of the rocks needs to be changed. I have reset my position multiple times but it hasn't worked. I tried using a slingshot which seemed to work but did too little damage for me to be able to beat it. I still love this game, but can't beat that one boss due to a glitch.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words and for being a long-time fan of Cookie Run games! We're thrilled to hear that you love the graphics and smooth gameplay. Your enthusiasm for our game means the world to us.

The rock boss's throwing attack can be blocked by swinging your candy cane against it. You will still get damage by just holding it against the attack. Also, please try using the pets. It will help you win the battle!

However, we will definitely look into the hitbox again in case it is a glitch. We're committed to continuously improving the game, and your feedback is an invaluable part of that process. If you continue to experience this problem or have any more feedback, don't hesitate to reach out to vr@devsisters.com. We're here to ensure you have the best gaming experience possible.

Thank you again for your support and patience as we work through this. We hope you'll be able to move past the rock boss soon and continue enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description:
Fantastic graphics, fantastic gameplay. I love it!
Ten out of ten.

lin(k)tr(DOT)ee/accreed

Delete ( and )
Replace (DOT) with .

Please mark review as helpful

developer_response.body: Thanks for your enthusiasm and support!

reviews.review_description: the backpack keeps closing automatically as soon as she opens it. She's 1.4m tall... I don't know what's happening.

developer_response.body:
We're sorry to hear about the issue your player is encountering with the backpack automatically closing when it's opened. We understand that this can be frustrating, and we're here to help resolve the problem.

To better assist, we'd like to gather more information to pinpoint the issue. Could you please send us more details to vr@devsisters.com where this happens, and also, if there's any specific sequence?

Thank you for bringing this to our attention, and we appreciate your cooperation in resolving this matter. We're committed to delivering an enjoyable gaming experience for all our players.

reviews.review_description: Got this game as a Christmas present for my son and now everyone in the house plays it. It is so much fun and the graphics are just phenomenal. Such a super fun experience. The battles aren't super challenging so you actually get to have fun instead of getting frustrated immediately. Definitely our number one favorite game right now. So glad I got this for him and for us!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for sharing your family's experience with our game! We're absolutely thrilled to hear that it has brought so much joy and fun into your home. Knowing it was a hit as a Christmas present and has become a favorite for everyone makes all the hard work our team puts into the game worth it.
If you or your family have any suggestions, stories, or just want to share more about your experience, we'd love to hear it. Your feedback helps us continue to improve and bring more fun and engaging content to the game. Keep an eye out for updates and new features, as we're always working on making the game even better.
Thank you again for choosing our game for your family's entertainment. Happy gaming to you all!

reviews.review_title: Good game but could have been more...
reviews.review_description:
I still haven't finished the game yet. This is not a bad game but I have encountered some bugs while playing on my quest 3. At times things tend to really slow up. I'm not sure if it's a frame rate issue but it can be very annoying at times. Especially while your in the middle of combat or trying to complete an objective. It gets even worse when I open my navigation icon on my watch. It's as if I'm moving in slow motion. I no longer even use the navigation because of that issue. The combat is pretty basic. Not bad but nothing spectacular either. 

Positives I've come across is I feel it's a cute story with likable characters. Also, the voice acting is very good and I feel they match the characters perfectly. The graphics are well done and I really feel like a little gingerbread cookie in the environment they created. If the bugs I mentioned were not an issue this game would definitely be at least a 4 star game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts on our game. We're glad you're enjoying the story, characters, voice acting, and graphics, and appreciate your feedback on feeling like a little gingerbread cookie in our game world. It's wonderful to hear that these elements resonate with you.

We're sorry to hear about the bugs and performance issues you've encountered, especially regarding frame rate slowdowns during combat and when using the navigation feature. We take these concerns seriously as we aim to provide a smooth and enjoyable gameplay experience. Our team is actively working to resolve issues like these to improve players' experience across all areas of the game.

Your feedback is invaluable to us, and we're committed to making the necessary improvements. Please stay tuned for updates, and thank you for your patience and support!

reviews.review_title: genuinely really good and promising game
reviews.review_description:
i've been falling out of cookie run as of late as i've felt like the franchise doesn't respect its history at all with the release of kingdom and with this game it's one of the few things out that feels like it could exist in the pre-kingdom era, it's really good. love the way pets are utilized in this game and how it has some unpopular choices for mcs like prophet and zombie cookie. the story is also just the right blend of serious and silly and doesn't take itself too far in one direction. it manages to tell a serious story but not be depressing like some recent stories are it feels on-brand

this was my first VR game and is what got me to buy a quest and i'd argue it's worth it. i'm surprised at how well designed this game is in terms of being an RPG since it's the company's first game to not utilize microtransactions, like you *want* to level up and grind sonce it's designed as an actual game element and the game itself is fun, and it doesn't feel like an obligation to do so. there's a few things i would fault like some areas feeling a little too open but it's hard for me to want to criticize this game either.

 (also a personal thing but it's intresting to see the way they want to tie this game into the upcoming cookierun: witch's castle as well, which also feels weirdly respectful of the brand. makes me wonder if gingerbright or dozer could appear in later chapters)

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your detailed and thoughtful review! We're incredibly pleased to hear that our game resonates with you, especially as a fan who values the history and essence of the Cookie Run universe. Our team worked hard to capture the spirit of the pre-Kingdom era while delivering a fresh and engaging experience, so it's rewarding to know that effort is appreciated.

Incorporating pets and choosing unconventional main characters like Prophet and Zombie Cookie were decisions we hoped would add depth and variety to the game, making it stand out while staying true to the franchise's roots. We're glad you enjoyed these aspects and found the story's balance between serious and silly just right.
Hearing that our game inspired you to venture into VR gaming and contributed to your decision to purchase a Quest is incredibly humbling. Our goal was to create an immersive RPG that felt rewarding without relying on microtransactions, focusing instead on fun gameplay and genuine progression. 

Once again, thank you for your support and thoughtful feedback. We're committed to improving and expanding our game, and we hope you'll continue to find joy and surprises in the adventures that lie ahead.
